# opnsense_dnsmasq_tag (Resource)

Manages a Dnsmasq DHCP tag on OPNsense. Tags can be referenced by Dnsmasq DHCP ranges, options, boot entries, and host entries.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_dnsmasq_tag" "pxe" {
  tag = "pxe"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `tag` (String) Unique Dnsmasq DHCP tag name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the Dnsmasq DHCP tag UUID from OPNsense.

```shell
terraform import opnsense_dnsmasq_tag.pxe 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
